creator: gslin@gslin.org
text:
- Remove All INSTALLS_SHLIB from ports

Fix: 

Replace the following list by:

perl -pi -e 's,^INSTALLS_SHLIBS=.*$,USE_LDCONFIG=yes,g'

Then fix misc/compat4x/Makefile (special case) manually.
